tagline: Family Owned · Licensed & Insured · Baltimore, MD
headline: Baltimore Plumbing Done Right — Fair Price, 1-Year Warranty, No Gimmicks
subheadline: Abbott Brothers is a small, family-run plumbing company that genuinely cares about the job. We charge $69 for a service call, stand behind every repair with a 1-year warranty, and offer 10% off for seniors, military, and first responders.
service_descriptions: Comprehensive residential and commercial plumbing — from fixture repairs and pipe replacements to full system renovations, all backed by our 1-year warranty.
Installation and repair of tank and tankless water heaters — free estimates on replacements with same-day availability when possible.
From everyday kitchen and bathroom clogs to full sewer line replacements, we clear the blockage fast and diagnose the root cause.

reviews.text: I've been burned by big plumbing companies charging $300 just to show up. Abbott Brothers charged $69, diagnosed a cracked drain pipe, and quoted me fairly to fix it. Clean work, honest pricing — they've earned every future job at my house.
Used the military discount for a water heater install. The tech was on time, explained the options clearly, and had it running in two hours. The 1-year warranty gives real peace of mind.

Had a nasty sewer backup on a Saturday morning. Abbott Brothers picked up, showed up within two hours, and cleared the whole main line. Didn't try to upsell me or scare me into unnecessary work. Refreshingly straightforward.

issues_addressed: Existing site lacks trust signals and social proof
No clear pricing displayed to reduce friction
